cues.tr: Lesson 12: I'll think about it and let you know

cues.text: 你決定了嗎？要不要跟我們一起去旅行？
cues.tr: Have you made up your mind? Do you want to go on a trip with us?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 為什麼還沒決定呢？這個地方很好玩，風景也很美。
cues.tr: Why haven't you decided? This place is fun and the scenery is beautiful.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是啊，我知道。不過最近我工作越來越忙，可能沒時間去。
cues.tr: Yes, I know. I know, but I've been so busy with work lately that I may not have time to go.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 喔，我覺得休息一下也很重要。你越是累，就越需要放鬆。
cues.tr: Well, I think it's important to take a break. The more tired you are, the more you need to relax.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 你說得有道理。我知道放鬆很重要，但我擔心如果現在去旅行，回來會有更多工作等著我。
cues.tr: You have a point. I know it's important to relax, but I'm worried that if I go on a trip now, I'll come back with more work waiting for me.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 其實，我和大明都跟你一樣，我們都很忙，但我們都覺得這次旅行是個好機會，可以放鬆一下。
cues.tr: Actually, Damien and I are just like you, we are both very busy, but we both think that this trip is a good opportunity to relax.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 嗯，不過我的工作比你們的可能更麻煩一些。
cues.tr: Yes, but my job is a bit more complicated than yours.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 不一定吧，我的工作也比以前更忙了。但是去旅行後，我覺得精神比之前好多了。
cues.tr: Not necessarily. My work is also busier than before. But after the trip, I feel better than before.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 真的嗎？那你覺得旅行比在家休息好嗎？
cues.tr: Really? Do you think traveling is better than resting at home?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 當然啊，旅行可以看到不一樣的風景，心情也會變得比待在家裡更好。
cues.tr: Of course. You can see different landscapes when you travel, and your mood will be better than at home.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 聽起來不錯。不過，我還是要考慮考慮。
cues.tr: Sounds good. But I still need to think about it.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒關係，你慢慢考慮。我覺得你越想越會覺得旅行是個好主意。
cues.tr: It's okay, take your time. I think the more you think about it, the more you'll realize that traveling is a good idea.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好的，我會再想想看。等我考慮清楚了，再告訴你們。
cues.tr: Okay, I'll think about it. I'll let you know when I've thought it over.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好的，我們等你的消息。希望你可以跟我們一起去。
cues.tr: Yes, we'll wait for your news. I hope you can come with us.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我會盡量！我考慮考慮再告訴你。
cues.tr: I'll try my best! I'll think about it and let you know.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒問題，不管怎麼樣，我們都尊重你的決定。
cues.tr: No problem, no matter what, we respect your decision.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 謝謝你們的理解，我會認真考慮的。
cues.tr: Thank you for your understanding, I'll think about it seriously.
cues.speaker: B
